name: HIPAA Security Rule (subset)
description: Illustrative HIPAA Security Rule themes for authorized healthcare labs — not a certification checklist.

controls.title: Security management process
controls.description: Risk analysis and risk management for ePHI.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Unique user IDs, emergency access, automatic logoff, encryption where reasonable.

controls.title: Audit controls
controls.description: Record and examine activity in systems with ePHI.

controls.title: Integrity
controls.description: Protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.

controls.title: Transmission security
controls.description: Guard against unauthorized access during transmission.

controls.title: Contingency plan
controls.description: Data backup, disaster recovery, emergency mode operations.
